topics.title: Minimum Wage
topics.content: Minimum wage in India varies by state. Every state sets its own minimum wage rates.
keyPoints: Contact state labor department for rates

topics.title: Overtime Pay
topics.content: Workers are entitled to overtime pay at double the normal rate for work beyond standard hours.

topics.title: Rent Agreements
topics.content: A rent agreement is a legal contract between landlord and tenant.

faqs.question: How to file an FIR?
faqs.answer: You can file an FIR at any police station regardless of jurisdiction. Police cannot refuse to register an FIR.

faqs.question: What is the minimum wage?
faqs.answer: Minimum wage varies by state. Contact your state labor department for current rates.
